title: MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS - 211info
text: ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lends durable medical equipment on a short-term basis, typically no longer than 3 months. Inventory includes wheelchairs, walkers, knee scooters, crutches, canes, toilet risers and commodes, shower stools, and transfer benches. Accepts donations of similar durable medical equipment. 795 Franklin Avenue SW Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on serving individuals recovering from surgery or an accident, those in hospice care, and those waiting for purchase authorization from their insurance carrier Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 590-2443 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 590-2443 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Douglas Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: At the corner of 8th Street SW and Franklin Avenue SW. Across from Bandon High School. Services: General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Walking Aids Wheelchairs/Wheeled Mobility If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET
